title: Sweet 'n' Sour sauce
description: A simple homemade sweet and sour sauce made with pineapple juice, vinegar, sugar, and soy sauce, thickened with cornflour.
steps: Drain the pineapple chunks and reserve 150 ml of the juice.
Mix the cornflour with a little of the reserved pineapple juice at a time until smooth.
Add the soy sauce, white wine vinegar, soft brown sugar, tomato ketchup, and chilli flakes.
Stir into any vegetable or meat combination and bring to the boil until thickened.
